title: Spiced Moroccan Fish Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African-inspired fish stew cooked in a clay pot. The spices and herbs infuse the fish with a rich and complex flavor.
instructions: 1. Heat the Moroccan spiced olive oil in a clay tagine or a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
2. Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
3. Add the Moroccan spices and stir for 1 minute.
4. Add the fish fillets and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side.
5. Add the chopped parsley, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper to the tagine.
6. Cover the tagine with a lid and transfer to the oven.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10-12 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
8. Serve hot and garnish with additional parsley if desired.
